description.ko: 별먼지가 무한한 공허 속에 숨은 측량할 수 없는 존재의 윤곽을 드러낸다.
description.en: Star dust reveals the contour of something immeasurable hidden inside the infinite void.

prompt: VOID-3 cosmic deep: a horizonless expanse of #0D0221 deep space where billions of #E6E6FA star-dust particles quietly map the outline of an unseen colossal presence, forming delicate contour bands and pressure ripples through the infinite void. Thin veils of #3D1A78 nebula vapor hang in layered sheets, pierced by faint #7B68EE luminous filaments that bend without forming a vortex, as if space itself is holding its breath. The composition has no spacecraft, planets, robots, black holes, or central object; only negative space, dust, distant buried stars, and the terrifying suggestion of scale. Ultra-detailed deep-space photography aesthetic, high particle density, soft volumetric haze, restrained lavender highlights, mysterious cosmic horror majesty, very slow celestial drift, silent and monumental atmosphere.
